title: [Honeyed Gears, Backroom]
description: Cool lamplight casts gentle shadows across polished floors and pristine surfaces.  Shelves, each flawlessly aligned, display labeled containers and gear-lined cases.  Near the far wall, a smooth walnut writing desk gleams beneath perfectly stacked folios, its drawers closed flush.  The faint scent of ginger and old ink lingers like a quiet promise of precision.
